description: Origin of life research - abiogenesis, RNA world, prebiotic chemistry.

facts.context: The RNA World hypothesis proposes that early life used:
facts.truth: RNA as both genetic material and catalyst
distractors: DNA as the original genetic material from the start
proteins that came before any nucleic acids
clay minerals as the primary replicating system

facts.context: The key challenge in abiogenesis research is explaining:
facts.truth: transition from chemistry to self-sustaining replication
distractors: how DNA evolved directly from simple molecules
why life uses carbon instead of silicon
the precise age of first life on Earth

facts.truth: amino acids form from simple gases with energy input
distractors: complete living cells can form spontaneously
DNA synthesizes from inorganic precursors directly
life can only arise from existing life

facts.context: LUCA (Last Universal Common Ancestor) was likely:
facts.truth: already complex with hundreds of genes
distractors: a single simple self-replicating RNA molecule
a cell with no genetic material at all
using a completely different genetic code

facts.context: Hydrothermal vent origin hypotheses propose vents provide:
facts.truth: chemical gradients and mineral catalysts for synthesis
distractors: only heat with no chemical contribution to life
conditions too extreme for any organic chemistry
fully formed cells emerging from vent fluids
both chiralities are equally present in life
physics requires one chirality over the other
homochirality has been fully explained already

facts.truth: whether energy systems or information came first
distractors: which specific metabolic pathway is most ancient
whether metabolism exists in modern cells
the exact date metabolism first appeared

facts.context: The phosphorus problem in prebiotic chemistry is that:
facts.truth: phosphate minerals have low solubility limiting availability
distractors: phosphorus was abundant and easily accessible
life could have started without any phosphorus
phosphorus only became important recently
proteins creating cell walls from the start
minerals providing permanent compartments
no compartmentalization in early life

facts.context: Ribozymes support RNA World by showing RNA can:
distractors: only store genetic information passively
never perform any catalytic function
catalyze only protein synthesis reactions

facts.truth: life arrived on Earth from elsewhere but doesn't explain origin
distractors: life originated independently on Earth
completely solves the origin of life problem
has been definitively disproven by evidence

facts.context: Autocatalytic sets are important because they show:
facts.truth: chemical networks can be self-sustaining without genes
distractors: genes must have come before metabolism
catalysis is impossible without enzymes
life requires no self-sustaining chemistry
